_provenance.head_type: SHIPPED-ALGORITHM deterministic-replay head (nearest method kin: P079's deterministic replay of a shipped mechanism; P077's true-sentence-survives move; P080/V093's no-stochastic-gate + margin-ledger + aux conventions) - the model replays three PINNED source behaviors read from ~150 lines of vendored source (bootstrap.py module engine/loop/telemetry.py at the grounding HEAD), not the function object itself; the source-semantics NULL axis prices exactly that; zero repo/network reads at verdict time
_provenance.committed: 2026-07-16, BEFORE the runner (the P017-P080 hermetic pre-registered discipline)
_provenance.arithmetic_convention: every decision leg is seedless exact integer counting - no floats, no Fractions needed anywhere in a decision path except the single registered rate ratio 1200/601, carried as an exact integer pair

pinned_source_behaviors.age_boundary: strictly > W escapes the dedupe; age exactly W (600) still dedupes
pinned_source_behaviors.slot_accounting: the scan tail is the last S LINES - verdict-carrying and malformed/naive-ts rows occupy slots while contributing no keys
pinned_source_behaviors.call_order: cmd_check appends the suppressed (verdict) batch FIRST, then the finding batch; verdict rows always append and never enter the key set
pinned_source_behaviors.read_vs_parse: the scan is path.read_text() - the WHOLE file - with only the JSON parsing capped at the last S lines

model_conventions.time: integer-second time; R check runs at uniform cadence c, run r at t = r*c starting at t = 0
model_conventions.day_horizon: 86400 s inclusive - the T1 day census counts appends over every run with t <= 86400
model_conventions.batching: per run V verdict rows then ONE batch of F persisting findings in stable order (keys 0..F-1); the scan key set is computed ONCE per fire batch, at batch start (the record_guard_fires call boundary); the one-batch convention is measured LOAD-BEARING and the split control is registered below
model_conventions.ledger: born empty; steady-state claims are stated as tail behavior (runs 41..80) per the registration

grids.line_bound_regime: c = 1, R = 80 (the pure line-bound regime for the F x V grid)
grids.repair_cells: S' = 1000 over the full F grid + margin cell F = 1001

world.saturated_region: V >= S or F >= 2*(S-V); on it the steady leak is exactly min(F, F-S+V); 13 grid cells qualify
world.compounding_region: V in {1, 5, 50} and not saturated - 20 grid cells; no constant law, registered exact orbits instead

laws.renewal: a single persisting finding re-records with period exactly p(c) = c*(floor(W/c)+1); day-horizon appends = floor(86400/p(c)) + 1
laws.cliff: with V = 0 the steady per-run leak is exactly max(0, F-S)
laws.rotation: the leaked identity rotates through the finding list in blocks of F-S with period exactly F/gcd(F, F-S); the run-2 leaked set first repeats at run 2 + F/gcd(F, F-S)
laws.saturated: steady leak = min(F, F-S+V) exactly iff V >= S or F >= 2*(S-V)
laws.reads: read_text() reads the whole ledger every fire batch: cumulative lines read on the (400, 0, 60, 11) scenario = the closed quadratic sum 400*10 + 200*(0+1+...+9) = 13,000; parse calls = sum of min(len, S) = 2,000

compounding_totals_runs_2_80.note: the registration lists these 13 totals 'on the registered cells' without naming the cell order; the F-major mapping below (F in {199, 200, 201, 250, 300} x V in {1, 5, 50}, skipping (200,1) - registered separately as 1025 - and (300,50) - saturated, registered 150) was resolved at prototype rehearsal and every value matches positionally

repairs.S_prime_1000_grid: steady leak 0 on the whole F grid (V = 0)
repairs.keyed_index: leak 0 at EVERY (F, V) grid cell; renewal preserved (the day table reproduces under the keyed arm on all 9 cadences)

anchors_F3.design_point: F in {1, 50, 200}, V = 0, c = 60, R = 3: re-runs append exactly 0 (the TRUE SENTENCE survives)

controls_F5.window_off: W -> infinity on the breathing cell (201, 300, 24): collapses to exactly 1/run after run 1 - the 199-bursts are EXPIRY, not the line bound
controls_F5.scan_off: parse the whole file (S -> infinity), window kept: (400, 0, 60, 11) leaks 0
controls_F5.V_ge_S_saturation: V = 200 >= S: leak == F exactly on all 8 F cells (the run's own verdict rows fill the whole tail)
controls_F5.order_flip: verdict-first vs fires-first per-run fire-append sequences IDENTICAL on the 8 probed uniform-V cells (see _disclosures.order_flip_cells) - verified not assumed
controls_F5.batch_split: 250 split as 125+125 (two record_guard_fires calls per run, each with its own scan): steady per-run leak set {50, 75} vs one-batch {50} - the one-batch convention is LOAD-BEARING, census registered
controls_F5.naive_ts: naive-timestamp rows dedupe nothing (fail-open, the pre-fix behavior): (200, 0, c=1, R=3) appends [200, 200, 200] vs aware [200, 0, 0]
controls_F5.S_prime_relocation: S' = 1000: whole F-grid leak 0 + margin cell F = 1001 -> 1/run (the cliff RELOCATES exactly)

contacts.C1: T1 replay day counts == the closed renewal law floor(86400/p(c))+1 on all 9 cadences (131/121/97/81/73/144/131/97/73)
contacts.C2: V = 0 steady leak == max(0, F-S) on all 8 F cells AND rotation first-repeat run == 2 + F/gcd(F, F-S) on all 4 rotation cells (F = 201 observed at run 203 on the extended rotation leg)
contacts.C3: Arm B per-run sequence == Arm A per-run sequence EXACTLY on all 20 compounding-region cells (80 runs each) AND all 13 saturated cells
contacts.C4: Arm A measured lines-read == the closed quadratic sum (13,000) AND parse calls == sum of min(len, S) (2,000) on the read scenario

arm_r.grammar: per trace EXACTLY 4 rng.randint draws in registered order: F = randint(1, 400), V = randint(0, 8), c = randint(60, 1200), R = randint(2, 12); ONE random.Random(seed) per seed for all N traces; each trace replayed under the pinned model; REPORTING-ONLY, no statistical gate
arm_r.triple_definition: (leak_regime_traces, max_per_run_burst, total_appends) - see _disclosures.arm_r_census_fields for the sim-chosen field realizations

20261721.role: aux - reserved, NEVER read by any leg

arm_r.allocation_note: seeds 20261718-721 allocated from 20261718 per the v093 heartbeat baton: 20261714-717 are P080/V093's registered set (aux 20261717 never read), so 20261718 is the next free index; the next free block after this allocation starts at 20261722
arm_r.cpython_pin: 3.11 (the minor this verdict session runs and asserts; Arms A/B are seedless exact integer arithmetic, platform-independent - only Arm R and the presentation shuffle touch the pinned minor's random module)

decision_rule.order: REJECT -> INVALID -> APPROVE -> NULL (REJECT evaluated FIRST)
decision_rule.REJECT: R1 AND R2 AND R3 AND R4
decision_rule.R1_renewal_non_monotonicity: p(c) = c*(floor(W/c)+1) with the day table exact on all 9 cadences AND the witness pair p(600) = 1200 / p(601) = 601 with rate ratio exactly 1200/601
decision_rule.R2_cliff_plus_alibi: steady leak == max(0, F-S) at V = 0 with the margin-0 pair (200 -> 0/run, 201 -> 1/run) AND rotation periods 201/5/3/2 with the F = 250 block census
decision_rule.R3_compounding_displacement: the saturated law min(F, F-S+V) exact on every qualifying cell with the boundary pair ((398,1) constant 199, (397,1) non-constant) AND the registered compounding orbits - (200,1): run-2 leak 1, peak 19 at run 20, tail mean exactly 14, total 1025 vs naive 79; (200,50) -> exactly 100/run; (250,50) -> the 2-cycle {100,150}; (1,50) -> period 4
decision_rule.R4_breathing_plus_read_bill: the (201,300,24) orbit == 201, (1,1,199)x7, 1, 1 (total 1610) with the window-off control at exactly 1/run AND the read censuses (13,000/2,000; 20,122/4,600) with the scan-off control at leak 0
decision_rule.INVALID: any F1-F6 gate failure (controls misbehaving - report, no ruling)
decision_rule.APPROVE: the shipped algorithm reproduces the keyed-index arm's zero-leak census on the full (F, V) grid AND the renewal rate is monotone non-increasing in c on the cadence grid - arithmetically excluded by the (201, 0) cell and the (600, 601) pair; mutually exclusive with REJECT
NULL_axes: source-semantics mismatch (the verdict session's own read of the pinned source contradicts a pinned behavior - the strict-> boundary, the lines-not-records slot accounting, or the suppressed-first call order; the corrected semantics + re-derived censuses are the finding)
replay-fidelity mismatch (Arm A and Arm B disagree on a registered sequence and the INVALID diagnosis does not localize it - the corrected orbit is the finding)
convention axis (the batch-split control's registered census fails to reproduce - the one-batch convention finding ships with corrected censuses)

gates.F1: model identities: ledger length == sum of fire appends + sum of verdict rows at every run boundary (asserted on instrumented probe cells); the scan key set is always a subset of the last S lines' in-window verdict-less keys and verdict rows never appear in any key set (structural probe); p(c) == 0 mod c on the grid; S and W echo the pinned constants; the Arm-R draw counter == 4N exactly
gates.F2: the six structure theorems re-derived from scratch: (a) RENEWAL - the day table and the closed law on all 9 cadences (C1); the witness pair and its exact ratio; (b) CLIFF - the V = 0 leak row and margin-0 pair; the rotation periods with the F = 250 blocks (C2); (c) COMPOUNDING - the saturated law on every qualifying cell, the boundary pair, and the 20 registered orbits twin-verified (C3); (d) BREATHING - the (201,300,24) orbit and its window-off control; (e) READS - the quadratic read census and parse census (C4) with the scan-off control; (f) TRUE SENTENCE - the design-point cells [F, 0, 0]
gates.F3: census anchors verbatim (the anchors_F3 block above)
gates.F4: pencil worlds: (a) F = 1, two runs 60 s apart - the second run's scan sees one 60-s-old record -> 0 appends; (b) p(601) in one line: floor(600/601) = 0 => p = 601; (c) the cliff by inspection: 201 findings, a 200-line tail - exactly one invisible, every run; (d) the (1,50) period by depth arithmetic: the fire sits at depth 50j+1 after j verdict-bearing runs, invisible iff 50j >= 200 => j = 4
gates.F6: battery: Arm B equals Arm A through the four typed contacts on every registered sequence; twin independently-written decision evaluators agree on the ruling token over an ENUMERATED boolean input set; Arm-R draw-count sentinel (exactly 80,000 / 32,000) and exact reproducibility (in-process double run per seed); presentation seed 20261720 read by presentation legs only; aux seed 20261721 never read; stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs; CPython minor pinned and asserted

_disclosures.note: sim-chosen realizations of shape-registered slots - vacancy-derived disclosures, never match claims
_disclosures.arm_r_census_fields: the registered preview triple's field labels are realized as: leak_regime_traces = traces whose FIRE appends over runs 2..R total > 0; max_per_run_burst = the maximum single-run fire-append count over all runs INCLUDING run 1; total_appends = total FIRE appends over all runs and traces (verdict rows excluded - they are counted separately by the F1 ledger-length identity); both registered preview triples reproduce exactly under these realizations
_disclosures.order_flip_cells: the 8 probed uniform-V cells of the order-flip control are realized as the full F grid {1, 50, 199, 200, 201, 250, 300, 400} at V = 5; the runner additionally sweeps the V = 1 and V = 50 rows as unregistered extra coverage (reported, not load-bearing)
_disclosures.rotation_leg_horizon: the rotation first-repeat contact needs the run count to exceed 2 + period, so rotation legs run R = period + 3 runs (F = 201 -> 204 runs; the F = 250/300/400 repeats are also visible inside the registered R = 80); every leak/orbit census stays at the registered R = 80
_disclosures.unregistered_small_cells: the six compounding cells at F in {1, 50} have no registered totals; their measured totals ((1,1) 0 / (1,5) 1 / (1,50) 19 / (50,1) 0 / (50,5) 100 / (50,50) 950) are reported as color, not gated - except (1,50) whose PERIOD 4 is registered and gated
_disclosures.naive_ts_cell: the naive-ts fail-open control's probe cell is (200, 0, c = 1, R = 3)
_disclosures.presentation_leg: seed 20261720 shuffles the display order of the F3 anchor-name roster in ONE reporting-only stdout line (no decision value passes through it)
_disclosures.prototype_rehearsal: the drafting-side prototype reproduced every registered anchor on its FIRST pass (untracked scratchpad, before this file was written); two realization details were pinned at that rehearsal - the leak-phase peak definition for (200,1) (max over runs >= 2, the initial burst of 200 excluded) and the rotation-leg horizon above; no decision value was adjusted
